items.title: Police release man arrested after three-year-old ends up in crocodile enclosure at UK zoo
items.summary: The man, who was arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after a three-year-old boy ended up in a zoo's crocodile enclosure, has been released on bail after police assessed him as not fit for an interview.

items.title: New anti-bullying reform in Malaysia could make parents liable for their children's behaviour

items.title: Meloni says Trump 'completely made up' claim she 'begged' him for a photo at G7
